mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_biz_task WHERE state IN ('SCHEDULED','RUNNING') AND next_plan_time IS NOT NULL AND next_plan_time <= #{now} ORDER BY next_plan_time ASC, task_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_biz_task SET next_plan_time=#{nextPlanTime},state=#{state},missed_count=missed_count+1, update_time=#{updateTime},version=version+1 WHERE task_id=#{taskId} AND version=#{version}

UPDATE tb_biz_task SET state=#{terminalState},completed_time=#{completedTime},update_time=#{completedTime},version=version+1 WHERE task_id=#{taskId} AND version=#{version} AND next_plan_time IS NULL AND planned_count>0 AND success_count+failed_count+missed_count+cancelled_count=planned_count AND ( (#{terminalState}='CANCELLED' AND state='CANCELLING') OR (#{terminalState} IN ('COMPLETED','PARTIAL_COMPLETED','FAILED') AND state='RUNNING') )
UPDATE tb_biz_task SET state=#{toState},update_time=#{updateTime},version=version+1 WHERE task_id=#{taskId} AND version=#{version} AND state IN #{state}

UPDATE tb_biz_task SET schedule_start_time=#{scheduleStartTime},schedule_end_time=#{scheduleEndTime}, interval_seconds=#{intervalSeconds},next_plan_time=#{nextPlanTime}, schedule_version=#{scheduleVersion},planned_count=#{plannedCount}, update_time=#{updateTime},version=version+1 WHERE task_id=#{taskId} AND version=#{version} AND state='PAUSED'

UPDATE tb_biz_task SET progress_current=#{progressCurrent},progress_total=#{progressTotal}, progress_message=#{progressMessage},progress_revision=#{progressRevision}, update_time=#{updateTime},version=version+1 WHERE task_id=#{taskId} AND task_mode IN ('ONCE','AT_TIME') AND progress_revision < #{progressRevision}

UPDATE tb_biz_task SET success_count=success_count+1,last_execution_id=#{lastExecutionId}, last_execute_time=#{lastExecuteTime},progress_current=#{progressCurrent}, progress_total=#{progressTotal},progress_message=#{progressMessage}, progress_revision=#{progressRevision},result_ref_type=#{resultRefType}, result_ref_id=#{resultRefId},result_summary=#{resultSummary},state=#{state}, completed_time=#{completedTime},update_time=#{updateTime},version=version+1 WHERE task_id=#{taskId} AND version=#{version} AND state IN ('SCHEDULED','RUNNING','PAUSED','CANCELLING') AND success_count+failed_count+missed_count+cancelled_count<planned_count AND #{state} IN ('SCHEDULED','RUNNING','PAUSED','CANCELLING','COMPLETED','PARTIAL_COMPLETED','CANCELLED')

UPDATE tb_biz_task SET failed_count=failed_count+1,last_execution_id=#{lastExecutionId}, last_execute_time=#{lastExecuteTime},progress_current=#{progressCurrent}, progress_total=#{progressTotal},progress_message=#{progressMessage}, progress_revision=#{progressRevision},last_failure_code=#{failureCode}, last_failure_message=#{failureMessage},state=#{state},completed_time=#{completedTime}, update_time=#{updateTime},version=version+1 WHERE task_id=#{taskId} AND version=#{version} AND state IN ('SCHEDULED','RUNNING','PAUSED','CANCELLING') AND success_count+failed_count+missed_count+cancelled_count<planned_count AND #{state} IN ('SCHEDULED','RUNNING','PAUSED','CANCELLING','FAILED','PARTIAL_COMPLETED','CANCELLED')
